name: vomni-review
description: Domain-native code review engine for vllm-omni PRs. Combines deterministic file-by-file coverage with static analysis and targeted review rules for multimodal model code.

plugins.name: vomni-review
plugins.description: Review vllm-omni PRs with domain-specific static analysis and per-file LLM review. Detects tensor shape issues, CUDA patterns, connector lifecycle bugs, and more.
